content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the car well-centered on the straight portion transitioning into the right bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 17, target = (17 + 5) % 121 = 22
- Target waypoint 22: (6.3541, 0.6985)
- Car: x=5.5299, y=0.6367, heading=-1.603°
- dy = 0.6985 - 0.6367 = 0.0618
- dx = 6.3541 - 5.5299 = 0.8242
- bearing = atan2(0.0618, 0.8242) = 4.29°
- delta = 4.29° - (-1.603°) = 5.89°
- |delta| ≈ 5.9° → slight left correction, use 2.5° steering

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track is straight ahead transitioning into a right curve; delta to target waypoint 22 is ~5.9° left, so apply minimal positive steering to stay on the waypoint line without oscillating.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight section heading due east (~0° heading)",
    "Car is slightly right of center (distance_from_center=0.048) but all wheels on track",
    "Sharp right curve begins around waypoints 24-32 (x=6.5-7.3)",
    "After the right curve, track goes west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width is ~0.76m",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on straights; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Need to prepare for right turn (negative steering) starting around x=6.3-6.5",
    "Car holding steady at ~-1.6° heading on straight — nearly on course"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.278, 5.328, 5.380, 5.430, 5.530],
    "y": [0.6430, 0.6421, 0.6410, 0.6392, 0.6367],
    "yaw": [-1.550, -1.493, -1.540, -1.591, -1.603]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP22 at (6.354, 0.699): dy=0.062, dx=0.824, bearing=4.29°, delta=+5.89° → slight left correction",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 2.5
}
```
